title: Pioneer 0 (Thor-Able 1)
description: Open datasets and source materials relevant to Pioneer 0 (1958), Thor-Able launch vehicle, early Pioneer program, and Chamerion angustifolium (Fireweed)

sources.name: NSSDC Master Catalog -- Pioneer 0
sources.description: NASA Space Science Data Coordinated Archive entry for Pioneer 0. Spacecraft description, instrument inventory, mission profile, launch vehicle details.

sources.name: Deep Space Chronicle (NASA SP-2002-4524)
sources.description: Asif Siddiqi's comprehensive chronology of deep space and planetary probes, 1958-2000. Pioneer 0 mission profile, launch vehicle details, failure analysis, program context.

sources.name: Lunar Impact: A History of Project Ranger (NASA SP-4210)
sources.description: R. Cargill Hall's history of Project Ranger. Provides institutional context for the early lunar missions, including the Pioneer program's role as precursor.

sources.name: Uplink-Downlink: History of the Deep Space Network (NASA SP-2001-4227)
sources.description: Douglas Mudgway's history of the DSN. Covers tracking and communications infrastructure for Pioneer missions.

sources.name: Jonathan McDowell's Launch Vehicle Database
sources.description: Comprehensive launch log for all orbital and suborbital launches. Thor launch history, success/failure rates, payload masses. Essential for the launch success rate visualization (simulation E2).

sources.name: NASA Image and Video Library -- Pioneer Program
sources.description: Historical photographs related to the Pioneer program. Thor-Able on launch pad, Cape Canaveral LC-17A, spacecraft assembly.

sources.name: USGS Fire Effects Information System -- Chamerion angustifolium
sources.description: Comprehensive ecological profile of fireweed: fire response, post-fire succession, distribution, management implications. Includes data from Mt. St. Helens recovery studies.

sources.name: Flora of North America -- Chamerion angustifolium
sources.description: Authoritative taxonomic description: morphology, distribution, habitat, variation. Includes the Epilobium → Chamerion reclassification rationale.

sources.name: USDA PLANTS Database -- Chamerion angustifolium
sources.description: Distribution maps, conservation status, wetland indicator status for fireweed across North America.

sources.name: Mount St. Helens Succession Studies (USFS PNW Research Station)
sources.description: Long-term ecological research from the Mount St. Helens blast zone. Fireweed colonization data, primary succession timelines, permanent plot monitoring (1980-present).

sources.name: Smithsonian National Air and Space Museum -- Pioneer Program
sources.description: Museum collection records for Pioneer program artifacts. Engineering models, diagrams, historical photographs.

sources.name: Astronautix -- Rocketdyne LR-79 Engine
sources.description: Engine specifications for the LR-79: thrust, Isp, mass, dimensions, propellant flow rates. Used in trajectory simulation and turbopump analysis.

sources.name: Georgetown University Library -- Pearl Bailey Papers
sources.description: Pearl Bailey attended Georgetown University and earned a B.A. in theology in 1985 at age 67. The special collections may hold papers related to her time there.
